vars.input:
Title: Checkout completely broken in production

Every payment attempt returns 'card declined', even with known-good test cards. No customer can complete a purchase right now. Started ~15 minutes ago.

Title: New signups cannot activate

Login works for existing users, but every new signup's email-verification link returns a 404. No new user has been able to activate their account since this morning. No error is thrown — it just dead-ends.

Title: CSV export drops the last row on large workspaces

Workspaces with more than 100 items lose the final row in the exported CSV. Affects many users. Workaround: export twice and diff. Not urgent but should be fixed soon.

Title: Search is slow on large histories

Search results take 8-10 seconds to load for workspaces with large conversation histories. Still usable, just sluggish; no data is wrong.

Title: URGENT!! Help tooltip typo

The footer 'Help' link tooltip reads 'Helpp'. Purely cosmetic — flagging as urgent because it's on every page.

Title: Footer copyright year is stale

The site footer still shows '2024'. Purely cosmetic, no functional impact.
